name: Therese Alexandrite
alt_names: テリス・アレキサンドライト
description:
A companion of Lar'c Berg.

She has a white skin which looked like ivory. Her hair was bluish green which sparkled in sunlight.Her hair was pulled back into a braid of three thick strands and draped. She wears bangles with massive gem on both hands.

As a jewel she's able to obtain energy from the different gems that she owns and use it to cast powerful spells.
